candidate_definitions.text: The knowledge compiler. Raw sources in, interlinked wiki out. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.
Compile raw sources into an interlinked markdown wiki.
Open Source Implementation of Karpathy's LLM Wiki. Upload documents, connect your Claude account via MCP, and have it write your wiki !
[![Live Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/demo-llmwiki.app-blue)](https://llmwiki.app)

The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

Stop re-explaining your research to your AI agent. Persistent, LLM-maintained wikis that compound over time. Drop PDFs, URLs, YouTube - your agent remembers forever. Based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
5ire is a cross-platform desktop AI assistant, MCP client. It compatible with major service providers,  supports local knowledge base and  tools via model context protocol servers .
<div align="center">

Langchain-Chatchat（原Langchain-ChatGLM）基于 Langchain 与 ChatGLM, Qwen 与 Llama 等语言模型的 RAG 与 Agent 应用 | Langchain-Chatchat (formerly langchain-ChatGLM), local knowledge based LLM (like ChatGLM, Qwen and Llama) RAG and Agent app with langchain
![](docs/img/logo-long-chatchat-trans-v2.png)
Markdown knowledge base with bidirectional [[link]]s built on top of VSCode
Markdown knowledge base with bidirectional [[link]]s built on top of [VSCode](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode).
A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link:  http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: https://logseq.io/p/NX4mc_ggEV
Athens is no longer maintainted. Athens was an open-source, collaborative knowledge graph, backed by YC W21
Some links are provided below for posterity.
[ACL2025 demo track] ROGRAG: A Robustly Optimized GraphRAG Framework
English | [Simplified Chinese](./README_zh_cn.md)

Claude Code plugin that generates individualized knowledge systems from conversation. You describe how you think and work, have a conversation and get a complete second brain as markdown files you own.
**A second brain for your agent.**
LobeHub organizes your agents into 7×24 operation. It hires, schedules, reports on your entire AI team. You stay in charge — without staying online.
🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.
